responses: Hello! How can I assist you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?

patterns: What does the academic portal do?
responses: This is an AI-Based Academic Portal designed for BS-level students to view results, subjects, and semester details.
The portal helps students and admins manage academic data efficiently with AI assistance.

patterns: How can I check my marks?
Where can I see my grades?
How to view my semester result?
responses: Go to your dashboard and select your semester to view marks and grades.
Click on your program and semester card to view your results and percentage.
Admins can edit student data and marks through the Admin Panel using their login credentials.
If you are an admin, log in and navigate to 'Manage Students' or 'Manage Marks' to update records.
Take a short break and come back stronger — you’ve got this! 💪
Don’t give up, you’re doing great. Every small step counts!
Remember why you started — success takes effort and patience.

patterns: What AI features are in this portal?
responses: This portal uses AI for chat assistance, result prediction, and automated warnings.
AI helps analyze student data and interact through this chatbot.
